name: Halasz Reporting & Video
description: Offers professional court reporting, legal videography, and videoconferencing services to Virginia's legal community since 1983.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: George Halasz and his staff provide excellent court-reporting and videography services throughout Virginia... personal, local touch.

sentiment.summary: Offers professional court reporting, legal videography, and videoconferencing services to Virginia's legal community since 1983.

name: Hart Reporting
description: Provides court reporting, legal videography, videoconferencing, and full litigation support services covering Virginia for over 30 years.

name: VideoWorks of Virginia
description: Provides professional videography and IT services for depositions, mediations, trial presentations, and remote AV support for over 30 years in Central Virginia.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Reid and his team are bright, talented, and dedicated professionals... adept in the use of the most current technology.
They were 'THE' original service in Richmond providing video for depositions... flexible and reliable.
VideoWorks puts my ideas into action. If you are looking for a great group that will help elevate your presentations... VideoWorks is that group.

sentiment.summary: Provides professional videography and IT services for depositions, mediations, trial presentations, and remote AV support for over 30 years in Central Virginia.
